_comment: Custom per-edit patterns for security-guidance plugin. Project-specific architectural invariants — enforced at edit time, before /review. See https://code.claude.com/docs/en/security-guidance.

patterns.reminder: Plugins MUST NOT access shared memory directly. Use framework middleware via PluginContext (ADR-120, feedback_no_shm_hacks).
Dict at Boundary: between processes only dict (to_dict/from_dict), never live SchemaBase/BaseModel (CLAUDE.md rule 1, feedback_dict_at_boundary_gui).
Never kill all python processes globally. Use TaskStop or PID-specific kill (feedback_no_global_taskkill).
Reverse import forbidden: framework MUST NOT import prototype. Enforced by .sentrux/rules.toml boundaries.
Reverse import forbidden: framework MUST NOT import Services. Layers: framework → Services → Plugins → prototype.
Services MUST NOT import prototype. Layers: framework → Services → Plugins → prototype.
Plugins MUST NOT import prototype. Plugin knows only PluginContext (ADR-120).
multiprocess_prototype_backup/ is a frozen snapshot. Agents are forbidden to modify it (CLAUDE.md CRITICAL).
knowledge/raw/ is immutable after ingestion. knowledge/wiki-llm/ is auto-generated by sci-compressor. Do not edit manually.
Hardcoded API key / token prefix detected. Move credentials to .env or private/ — never commit raw secrets.
Never skip commit hooks (--no-verify bypasses Why/Layer trailer validation). Fix the underlying issue instead.
